title: Addis 50ltr Pedal Bin, Grey Metallic, 518120
features: Perfect everyday family size plastic pedal bin with 50 litre capacity for regular household kitchen or business office use
Proudly made in the UK of hard-wearing plastic and available in a choice of colours to suit your décor allowing you to keep things clean, tidy, and effortlessly stylish without breaking the bank

Flat back space saving bin design to perfectly fit against kitchen walls; Hygienic pedal opening operation for convenient no handed daily use or manual full lid opening for changing the bin liners and emptying; Perfect for use with Addis 50 litre bin liner bags

Family size 50 litre weekly capacity; Closed bin dimensions w41 x d33 x h65.5cm / with pedal operated opening h82cm/ with full manual open lid h91cm (or w16" x d13" x h25.75 inches / pedal open h32.25 inches / fully open lid h36 inches); Easy to look after simply wipe clean with damp cloth when emptying your bin, No chance of rust with plastic
Addis Since 1780 a great British brand 'Made for Life' with Addis 10-year manufacturer's promise
description: Product Description Previous page Next page What are the dimensions of this bin? Closed bin dimensions w41 x d33 x h65.5cm (or w16" x d13" x h25.75 inches); With pedal operated opening lid h82cm (32.25 inches); With full manual open lid h91cm (h36 inches) What is the capacity? Perfect everyday family size plastic pedal bin with 50 litre capacity for regular household kitchen or business office use. Ideal for use with our Addis 50 litre bin liners. Where is this bin made? This plastic pedal bin is made in the UK at our South Wales Addis manufacturing site. Please note that Addis Direct is part of Addis, so you are being supplied direct from our UK Addis warehouse. How does the pedal bin opening mechanism work? Designed with wide bin width opening for added convenience. Partially open for everyday use with the bin pedal or manually open the lid fully to 90 degrees (stay open) to make bin liner replacement easier What if I experience a problem with my bin? We design our products to last, but if something goes wrong, we’re here to help. The bin includes a 10 year Addis promise, so please let our Addis customer support team know if you experience any issues.
